reason: The current frontier can be overread as showing that BBB opening itself is therapeutically efficacious. That reading is not supported once the 2018 FUS-alone caveat is carried forward.

evidence_considered.note: Opening alone showed no group-wise amyloid change post-sonication.
The positive signal occurs during monthly aducanumab infusions with regional FUS treatment.
Treat as a combination-specific efficacy signal, not generic proof of BBB-opening efficacy.

state_change.new_interpretation: FUS BBB opening is currently a delivery-enabling modality with feasibility/safety support; efficacy support is limited to a specific FUS-plus-aducanumab regimen.
state_change.old_interpretation: FUS BBB opening has emerging therapeutic efficacy in AD.
